description: Dead code removal sweep after HC-001 (ipc.ts decomposition), HC-002 (desktop-menu-actions deletion), HC-003 (DerivedElectronAPI type derivation)

findings.why_dead: Zero import references from any .ts/.tsx file in the entire repository. Originally part of DC-001 platform config extraction; never wired into the production path.
findings.risk: low — no consumers. Verify no dynamic require or build-time reference exists.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'platform-config' across all *.ts, *.tsx, *.json, *.svelte — zero matches in source code.

findings.why_dead: Empty stub file (0 lines). Zero import references. Created as a placeholder during DC-003 but never populated. No consumers.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'from "./plugin-transport"' across packages/desktop/src — zero matches.

findings.why_dead: Zero production import references. Not re-exported from plugin/index.ts (the barrel). PluginMeta namespace is only consumed by test files (test/plugin/meta.test.ts, test/fixture/plugin-meta-worker.ts) and archived session artifacts. All 8 individual exports and the self-reexport namespace are zombies in production.
findings.risk: low — test-only coverage. Tests must be updated or removed alongside.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'from "@/plugin/meta"' across src/ — zero matches. grep for 'from "./meta"' outside meta.ts itself — zero matches. grep for 'PluginMeta.' in production src/ — zero matches.

findings.why_dead: Entire file is dead-lettered. createPluginTransport() is never imported by any file. The import of PluginTransport from '@opencode-ai/plugin/desktop' (line 15) imports a type that does NOT exist in packages/plugin/src/desktop.ts. The Electron renderer transport would never activate because the preload bridge never exposes pluginSend/pluginOn/pluginOff/pluginInvoke (zero matches in preload/index.ts). Only the NoopTransport fallback would ever execute.
findings.risk: low — no callers, non-existent type dependency. Part of incomplete DC-003 plugin transport bridge.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'createPluginTransport' across packages/desktop/src/ — only matches in plugin-transport.ts itself. grep for 'from "./plugin-transport"' — zero matches. Verified packages/plugin/src/desktop.ts does not export PluginTransport type.

findings.why_dead: IPC handlers are registered but unreachable from the renderer. registerPluginTransportIpcHandlers() is called from ipc.ts but the channels it listens on (PLUGIN_SEND, PLUGIN_INVOKE) are never sent by the renderer because the preload bridge does not expose pluginSend/pluginOn/pluginOff/pluginInvoke methods. Exports onPluginMessage, onPluginInvoke, sendPluginPush are never imported by any production file.
findings.risk: medium — registerPluginTransportIpcHandlers() is called from ipc.ts line 30. That call site must also be removed. The handlers register ipcMain listeners that never fire but consume registration slots.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'onPluginMessage|onPluginInvoke|sendPluginPush' outside plugin-transport-ipc.ts — zero matches. Verified preload/index.ts exposes zero plugin bridge methods.

findings.why_dead: Three IPC channel constants defined but unreachable from renderer. Only referenced in ipc-contract.ts (type contract) and plugin-transport-ipc.ts (handler registration). Preload bridge never implements the corresponding API methods, so these channels can never be triggered.
findings.recommended_action: remove (if plugin-transport-ipc.ts is removed) or keep with note until DC-003 bridge is completed
findings.risk: low — dead channels consume namespace but cause no runtime errors. If keeping for future DC-003 completion, add comment noting the deferred bridge.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'PLUGIN_INVOKE|PLUGIN_SEND|PLUGIN_PUSH' — only matches in ipc-channels.ts, ipc-contract.ts, and plugin-transport-ipc.ts.

findings.why_dead: These types are only imported by ipc-contract.ts (line 37-38), where they support the ComplexAPIMethods.pluginSend/pluginOn/pluginOff/pluginInvoke declarations — which are themselves dead because the preload bridge never implements them. The types exist solely to serve the dead DC-003 plugin transport bridge.
findings.recommended_action: remove (if entire DC-003 bridge is removed) or keep with note
findings.risk: low — type-only exports. Removing requires removing imports in ipc-contract.ts.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'PluginTransportHandler|PluginTransportUnsub' — only matches in types.ts and ipc-contract.ts.

findings.why_dead: Four methods declared in the ComplexAPIMethods interface that are never implemented in the preload bridge (preload/index.ts). They form part of the DerivedElectronAPI type but have zero runtime implementation. The renderer plugin-transport.ts checks for api?.pluginSend which will always be undefined, falling back to noop transport.
findings.recommended_action: remove (if entire DC-003 bridge is removed) or keep with note
findings.risk: low — type-only interface members. Removing changes the DerivedElectronAPI type shape which would affect preload/types.ts ElectronAPI alias.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'pluginSend|pluginOn|pluginOff|pluginInvoke' in packages/desktop/src/preload/ — zero matches. Only referenced in renderer/plugin-transport.ts (the dead file) and ipc-contract.ts.

findings.why_dead: DeviceCodeResponse interface is exported but never imported by any other file in the repository. Only used internally within xai.ts (lines 219, 232, 259) as a return type annotation. This is a trivially dead export.
findings.recommended_action: remove export keyword (keep internal usage) or keep with note if external API consumers exist outside repo
findings.risk: none — type-only, no runtime effect. Removing export keyword would not affect functionality.
findings.falsifier_checked: grep for 'DeviceCodeResponse' outside xai.ts — zero matches in all .ts/.tsx files.

clean_areas.note: No stale references to deleted desktop-menu-actions.ts remain. All 36 source files are actively imported by at least one other file (except the two dead files listed above). HC-002 migration fully complete.

All 14 import targets resolve to existing files. All 4 exports (registerIpcHandlers, sendSqliteMigrationProgress, sendMenuCommand, sendDeepLinks) are consumed by index.ts. No stale comments or references to old locations. HC-001 decomposition clean.

ElectronAPI type alias (line 84) correctly re-exports DerivedElectronAPI from ipc-contract.ts. All 14 other type definitions have active production consumers, except PluginTransportHandler/PluginTransportUnsub (HC-004-007) which support the dead DC-003 bridge. HC-003 type derivation migration successful.
All 14 auth/plugin provider files are internally consumed through plugin/index.ts barrel. No post-DC-003 Electron/IPC remnants in plugin/ directory. meta.ts (HC-004-003) is the only dead module.

phase_3_dc003_resolution: Decide whether to complete or abandon the plugin transport bridge. If abandoned: remove channel constants, type exports, and ComplexAPIMethods entries. If completed: implement pluginSend/pluginOn/pluginOff/pluginInvoke in preload bridge.
